messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: BL topic records are neither complete nor durable — 26 have no opening summary, 31 of 34 were never committed
What it solves: THE REPORT'S PREMISE IS WRONG, AND THE TRUTH UNDERNEATH IT IS WORSE. The human reported that new
topics are still opening without a summary. They are not: BL-322's opening summary works, and has
worked for every topic opened since the record store went live. Verified on disk — BL-334, 335,
336, 337…
How it works: A record whose history starts at completion gains its missing opening summary
